data.title: 国际服Arcie小编礼服换装回 #14

data.body:
Welcome to the Gehenna Dress Party, Sensei!
Enjoy and celebrate the occasion with CM Arcie’s live stream tomorrow, as well as a ‘special’ announcement waiting at the end…!

🗓️Date & Time: 8/2 (Fri) 0:00 AM (UTC)
➡️YouTube Link: https://youtube.com/live/4WlpCQ9rx8w
